sglang.title: fix(swa): eliminate spurious translate_loc_from_full_to_swa warning in BCG and CG paths
sglang.author: ch-wan
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
PR #25824 introduced SWAKVPool.translate_loc_from_full_to_swa with a per-batch memoisation cache keyed on (data_ptr, numel). The cache fires a warning whenever the loc tensor changes without a prior invalidate_loc_cache() call. This warning was appearing on every BCG and CG forward.
Two r

sglang.title: [Spec] trtllm mha supports overlap plan stream
sglang.author: hanming-lu
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

The TRTLLM MHA kernel handles verification via q_len_per_req causal attention, not tree masks. All its verify metadata (seq_lens, page_table, cu_seqlens) is draft-independent and correctly computed by the plan stream. There's nothing to fix up, so pass is correct and race-free.

vllm.title: fix(eagle3): read norm_before_fc from eagle_config for NVIDIA checkpoint
vllm.author: ghost
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Eagle3 checkpoints from NVIDIA (GPT-OSS series) store norm_before_fc inside the nested eagle_config dict rather than as a top-level config field. We currently only check the top-level, so the RMSNorm before FC gets silently skipped for these checkpoints, causing degraded acceptance rate.
Fix

vllm.title: [Kernel] Batch invariant NVFP4 linear using cutlass
vllm.author: jzakrzew
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Alternative to #39727.
Interestingly, current nvfp4 cutlass linear is already batch invariant, although possibly by accident.
This PR adds an explicit flag that makes it use a dedicated cutlass config and a static assert to prevent someone from accidentally breaking it by changing the scheduler.
In

Fix input_audio chat content parsing when the content part carries a uuid.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix reasoning dropped on streaming boundary deltas

Co-authored-by: ashwing
Purpose
Fix reasoning content being silently lost when a multi-token streaming delta spans the reasoning/tool-call boundary (e.g., a single chunk contains the last reasoning tokens, the </think> token, and the first tool-call tokens).
Root cause

DelegatingParser.parse_delta

vllm.title: [KV Connector] Keep MooncakeStore full hits block-aligned
vllm.author: Dao007forever
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

round full-prompt MooncakeStore hits down to a block boundary before scheduling async load
remove the downstream +1 compensation paths in scheduler and worker now that kvpool_cached_tokens stays block-aligned
make MooncakeStore always use block-aligned partial-chunk discard behavior by remo
